questions.question: Write a MongoDB query to add a new city named 'New York' with its population at 85 million. Assume that there is an existing collection named 'cities' in the database.
Assuming the existing 'cities' collection has the following document: { _id: 1, name: 'London', population: 9000000 }
questions.hint: Update the existing city with the new population of 10 million.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the _id field in a MongoDB document?
